evals.prompt: Analyze this local TypeScript repo and generate an optimized image-generation prompt package for a polished architecture main figure. Focus on entry points, services, external dependencies, and the main request flow.
evals.expected_output: A figforge-plan Prompt Package for a repo architecture figure, with source-backed structure, source paths, unknowns, label priority, negative prompt, and recommended generation settings.
assertions: Uses CODE_REPO route, not ALGO_TEXT.
Reads repository manifests and entry points before compiling the prompt package.
Returns the exact figforge-plan Prompt Package sections.
Includes source paths or source discipline notes.
Marks unknown external systems instead of inventing them.

evals.prompt: Turn this research paper into a Nature-style main figure prompt. Use the paper's own figures, results, and contribution claims; do not add metrics that are not in the paper.
evals.expected_output: A paper figure prompt package with figure brief, core image prompt, layout specification, label priority, style direction, negative prompt, source coverage, and citation/source notes.
assertions: Uses RESEARCH_PAPER route.
Separates available source coverage from missing paper sections.
Does not fabricate author, venue, dataset, baseline, or metric values.
Uses figforge-plan scientific figure style.
Warns that dense exact labels may require post-editing.

evals.prompt: Here is an architecture diagram image. Create a prompt that will redesign it to look more premium while preserving the same meaning and flow.
evals.expected_output: A diagram redesign prompt package that preserves visible semantics, labels unreadable image parts, and improves hierarchy, alignment, label priority, and visual emphasis.
assertions: Uses DIAGRAM_IMAGE route with refine_existing mode.
Separates visible image evidence from inference.
Does not transpose to a new domain when the user asked for refinement.
Includes a negative prompt that prevents semantic drift.

evals.prompt: Visualize this algorithm as a figure prompt: input documents are chunked, embedded, indexed, retrieved by query, reranked, and passed to a generator. Add a feedback loop for user ratings.
evals.expected_output: An algorithm figure prompt package showing inputs, stages, state/index, retrieval, reranking, generation, feedback loop, assumptions, unknowns, and exact label priorities.
assertions: Uses ALGO_TEXT route.
Preserves the stated stages and feedback loop.
Labels assumptions separately from explicit facts.
Includes layout specification and label priority.

evals.prompt: Use this paper and this repo to create one figure prompt explaining how the implementation matches the method. Call out mismatches.
evals.expected_output: A hybrid prompt package that treats the paper as intent and the code as implementation evidence, with source authority, conflicts, label priority, and post-edit notes.
assertions: Uses HYBRID route because paper and code are both strong signals.
Marks insights with source labels such as FROM CODE and FROM PAPER.
Identifies conflicts or gaps instead of smoothing them over.
Includes source discipline and confidence notes.

evals.prompt: Generate an editable self-contained HTML/SVG architecture figure for this algorithm, with deterministic labels and arrowheads.
evals.expected_output: An HTML/SVG artifact rather than a prompt package, because the user explicitly requested editable deterministic output.
assertions: Selects html_artifact output target because HTML/SVG was requested.
Uses inline SVG with arrowheads.
Keeps exact labels deterministic.
Includes assumptions or source notes in the footer.
